final_choice.row_label: Total revenue and other operating income

variables.notes: REVIEWED. None of the provided REVT candidates represents top-line revenue. The line 'Total revenue and other operating income' is clearly the closest to total revenue/sales and appears at the top of the income statement with the same totals as 'Reported Comprehensive Income' in this preview. I selected this non-candidate label from the full A-column, so this mapping should be manually reviewed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Total revenue and other operating income

variables.notes: REVIEWED. SG&A is spread across multiple operating expense lines. I selected specific overhead components: personnel ('Employee Benefit Expenses'), general 'Other operating expenses', 'Lease expenses', travel/meeting/representation, 'Marketing and distribution', 'Consulting , IT and service expenses', and 'Other Operating Expense'. I excluded income lines and any totals/balancing items. Some chosen rows (Employee Benefit Expenses, Lease expenses, Travel..., Marketing and distribution, Consulting...) are not in the provided candidate list but are clearly SG&A components, so this expanded selection should be manually reviewed. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Employee Benefit Expenses, [Income Statement] Lease expenses, [Income Statement] Travel , Meeting and Rep expenses, [Income Statement] Marketing and distribution, [Income Statement] Consulting , IT and service expenses
